    Meng Zhai 翟猛

    Postdoctoral Fellow in RCLAE, AAE 博士后研究员 (PolyU)

    • Focusing on improving yourself is usually the safest way to be happy. 专注于提升自己通常是最安全的快乐方式。
    • Hong Kong 香港
    • The Hong Kong Polytechnic University 香港理工大学
    • Email 邮箱
    • Google Scholar 谷歌学术
    • ORCID ORCID

    👨🏻‍🎓 Biography👨🏻‍🎓 个人简介

    I am a Postdoctoral Fellow in Research Centre for Low Altitude Economy, Department of Aeronautical and Aviation Engineering, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University, working with Prof. Wen-Hua Chen. My research focuses on autonomous safe landing of rotorcraft UAVs and underactuated mechatronic/robotic systems, with equal emphasis on theory and application. Previously, I received the Ph.D. degree in Artificial Intelligence (with honors) from Nankai University, Tianjin, China, in June 2026, under the supervision of Prof. Ning Sun at the Underactuated Robots Lab. I received the B.Eng. in Automation (with honors) from Jilin University, Changchun, China, in June 2021.

    目前，我在香港理工大学低空经济研究中心、航空及民航工程学系担任博士后研究员，合作导师为陈文华教授。我的研究聚焦于旋翼无人机自主安全降落和欠驱动机电/机器人系统，理论与应用并重。此前，我于2026年6月在南开大学获得人工智能专业工学博士学位，师从孙宁教授，并在国内领先的欠驱动机器人实验室开展研究工作。此外，我于2021年6月在吉林大学获得自动化专业工学学士学位。

    I have been awarded the National Natural Science Foundation of China (NSFC) Youth Student Basic Research Project (for Ph.D. students) as principal investigator. My research contributions have resulted in 10+ peer-reviewed publications in top journals, including IEEE Transactions. These achievements have been recognized with 5 Best Paper/Best Poster awards at conferences, the Autonomous Robotic Technology Seminar (ARTS) Scholarship Nomination Award (8 candidates worldwide each year), the National Scholarship for Doctoral Students, the BYD Scholarship, and other academic awards/honors. I have also contributed to the research community as a reviewer for IEEE TIE, IEEE TSMCS, IEEE TCyber, IEEE RAL, IEEE Internet of Things Journal, Nonlinear Dynamics, ISA Transactions, ICRA, ACC, CDC, etc.

    我作为项目负责人主持获批了国家自然科学基金青年学生基础研究项目（博士研究生）。目前，我已在包括 IEEE Transactions 在内的高水平期刊发表同行评审论文10余篇 。相关研究成果获得会议最佳论文奖/最佳张贴论文奖共5项，并先后获自主机器人技术研讨会奖学金提名奖（全球每年8名候选人）、博士研究生国家奖学金、比亚迪奖学金及其他学术奖励与荣誉。此外，我还担任 IEEE TIE、IEEE TSMCS、IEEE TCyber、IEEE RAL、IEEE Internet of Things Journal、Nonlinear Dynamics、ISA Transactions、ICRA、ACC、CDC 等期刊和会议的审稿人。

    I look forward to potential academic discussions and collaborations. Please feel free to contact me at tangshi2026@gmail.com.

    我期待未来的学术交流与合作。随时欢迎通过 tangshi2026@gmail.com 与我联系。

    📖 Experiences📖 工作经历

    • Postdoctoral Fellow in Research Centre for Low Altitude Economy (RCLAE), Department of Aeronautical and Aviation Engineering (AAE), The Hong Kong Polytechnic University (PolyU), Hong Kong, China
      Co-supervisor: Chair Professor Wen-Hua Chen (Fellow of IEEE, IMechE, IET, HEA)
      Research Areas: Autonomous safe landing of rotorcraft UAVs; Active learning control
      博士后研究员，香港理工大学（PolyU）， 航空及民航工程学系（AAE）、 低空经济研究中心（RCLAE），中国香港
      合作导师：陈文华教授（IEEE Fellow、IMechE Fellow、IET Fellow、HEA Fellow）
      研究方向：旋翼无人机自主安全降落；主动学习控制
      08/2026–Present

    🎓 Education🎓 教育背景

    • Ph.D. in Artificial Intelligence, College of Artificial Intelligence, Nankai University (985, Double First Class), Tianjin, China
      Supervisors: Professor Ning Sun (Changjiang Young Scholars Program by the Ministry of Education)
      Research Areas: Underactuated mechatronic/robotic systems; Suspended micro-low gravity simulation systems; Planning and nonlinear/intelligent control
      博士（人工智能）， 南开大学， 人工智能学院， 中国天津
      导师：孙宁 教授（教育部青年长江学者）
      研究方向：欠驱动机电/机器人系统；悬吊式微低重力模拟系统；规划与非线性/智能控制
      09/2021–06/2026
    • B.Eng. in Automation, College of Communication Engineering, Jilin University (985, Double First Class), Changchun, China
      Ranking: 8/161 (Top 5%)    GPA: 3.79/4.0
      学士（自动化）， 吉林大学， 通信工程学院，中国长春
      专业排名：8/161（前 5%）    GPA：3.79/4.0
      09/2017–06/2021

    💬 Recent News💬 最新动态

    • 08/2026  😃 I joined the Hong Kong Polytechnic University as a postdoctoral fellow, working with Professor Wen-Hua Chen.2026/08  😃 我作为博士后研究员加入香港理工大学，与陈文华教授开展合作。

    • 06/2026  🎉 One conference paper has won the Best Paper Award at the 2026 IEEE 7th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Electromechanical Automation (IEEE-AIEA 2026)!2026/06  🎉 一篇会议论文荣获第七届IEEE人工智能与机电自动化国际学术会议 (IEEE-AIEA 2026) 最佳论文奖！

    • 06/2026  🎉 I graduated from Nankai University with a Ph.D. and was honored as an Outstanding Graduate Student at Nankai University.2026/06  🎉 我从南开大学毕业，获工学博士学位，并被评为南开大学研究生优秀毕业生。

    • 06/2026  🎉 One Chinese paper was accepted by Journal of Zhengzhou University(Engineering Science)!2026/06  🎉 一篇中文论文被《郑州大学学报（工学版）》录用！

    • 05/2026  👏🎉 I successfully defended my Ph.D. dissertation!2026/05  👏🎉 我成功通过了博士学位论文答辩！

    -- Read More News -- -- 查看更多消息 --

    🎯 Projects🎯 项目

    1. Research on Variable Tension and Follow-Up Control of Suspension Systems Under Micro-Low Gravity Simulation Scenarios
      Source: National Natural Science Foundation of China (NSFC) Youth Student Basic Research Project (for Ph.D. Students); Jan. 2025–Dec. 2026; CNY 300,000; Principal Investigator.
      Introduction: This project aims to achieve high-fidelity simulation of the equivalent mechanical environment of micro-low gravity fields using suspension systems, thereby providing feasible experimental conditions for ground-based studies of spacecraft dynamics on extraterrestrial bodies. Targeted methods for system design, modeling, and control are developed. The project outcomes have been practically implemented at the 518 Institute of the China Academy of Space Technology (CAST), which provides technical support for the ground-based validation of China’s extraterrestrial exploration missions.       微低重力模拟场景下悬吊系统变拉力及随动控制研究
      来源：国家自然科学基金青年学生基础研究项目（博士研究生）；2025年1月—2026年12月；人民币30万元；项目负责人。
      简介：本项目旨在利用悬吊系统实现微低重力场等效力学环境的高保真模拟，为在地面环境下研究航天器在地外天体表面的动力学行为提供可行的实验条件。项目有针对性地开发配套的系统设计、建模与控制方法。研究成果已在中国航天518研究所实际应用，为我国地外天体探测任务的地面验证工作提供技术支持。

    2. Dynamics-Mechanism-Driven General Planning and Control Methods for Underactuated Systems
      Source: Ph.D. Dissertation Research; Sep. 2021–Jun. 2026.
      Introduction: This research aims to address the common challenges faced by various underactuated systems, in which the number of independent control inputs is fewer than the number of system degrees of freedom. By analyzing and exploiting their dynamic structural characteristics or common task requirements, this research develops a class of unified planning and control methods to enhance the steady/transient performance, safety, reliability, robustness, and intelligence of underactuated systems.       动力学机理驱动的欠驱动系统通用规划控制方法研究
      来源：博士学位论文研究课题；2021年9月—2026年6月。
      简介：本研究旨在解决不同欠驱动系统（独立控制输入数量少于系统自由度，即以“少”控“多”）中广泛存在的共性问题。通过分析并利用其动力学结构特征或共同任务需求，本研究设计一类通用的规划与控制方法，以提升欠驱动系统的稳/暂态性能、安全性、可靠性、鲁棒性及智能性。

    📚 Selected Publications📚 代表性成果

    Explore the full list of publications on the Publications page. 点击 出版物 查看完整列表。

    Extended Kalman filtering-based nonlinear model predictive control for underactuated systems with multiple constraints and obstacle avoidance

    Meng Zhai, Tong Yang, Qingxiang Wu, Shudong Guo, Ruiping Pang, and Ning Sun

    IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, vol. 55, no. 1, pp. 369-382, Jan. 2025

    [Paper]

    Underactuated mechanical systems with both actuator and actuated/unactuated state constraints: A predictive control-based approach

    Meng Zhai, Ning Sun, Tong Yang, and Yongchun Fang

    IEEE/ASME Transactions on Mechatronics, vol. 28, no. 3, pp. 1359-1371, June 2023

    [Paper]

    Adaptive neural network unified control for general MIMO underactuated mechatronic systems with disturbances via modified normal forms

    Meng Zhai, Tong Yang, Ming Li, Xuerui Jiao, Yongchun Fang, and Ning Sun

    IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, vol. 22, pp. 19377-19391, 2025

    [Paper]

    Adaptive fuzzy control for underactuated robot systems with inaccurate actuated states and unavailable unactuated states

    Meng Zhai, Shuzhen Diao, Tong Yang, Qingxiang Wu, Yongchun Fang, and Ning Sun

    IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, vol. 22, pp. 1566-1578, 2025

    [Paper]

    📃 Selected Patents📃 部分专利

    • Nonlinear model predictive control algorithm for crane systems based on extended Kalman filtering, China Invention Patent, Patent No.: ZL202410176342.2, granted. 基于扩展卡尔曼滤波的吊车系统非线性模型预测控制算法，中国发明专利，专利号：ZL202410176342.2，已授权。

    • A crane control method, system, medium, device, and product, China Invention Patent, Patent No.: ZL202410674477.1, granted. 一种起重机控制方法、系统、介质、设备及产品，中国发明专利，专利号：ZL202410674477.1，已授权。

    • A device and method for measuring eddy current braking law based on radial magnetic field, China Invention Patent, Patent No.: ZL202010547822.7, granted. 一种基于径向磁场的涡流制动规律测定装置及测定方法，中国发明专利，专利号：ZL202010547822.7，已授权。
